subject: docs(session): fresh snapshot for PWA polish + fleet-alignment branch
body:
Rewrites SESSION_NOTES.md for the current branch's work: visibility-
paused SW polling, content-hashed PWA icons across HTML/manifest/SW,
z-index tiers in a typed constant, EVENT_BUS not-applicable decision,
and the cold + pwa audit passes with six follow-up fixes.
